title: Dirt Drops OP Loot
description: Makes dirt drop overpowered items such as diamond tools/armor, golden apples, netherite, etc.
body:
This data pack makes dirt blocks drop overpowered items such as diamonds, netherite and even totems of undying.

It changes the loot table of dirt to drop very good loot.

You could use this data pack for minecraft challenges, for playing with friends or just for fun.

To download this mod, put the zip file into the data pack folder of a world and enable it.

This mod might work for some versions other than 1.20.1 but I haven't checked, so I don't know for sure.

Have fun! :)
